basic_details.job_title: MDU Rohtak Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Maharshi Dayanand University (MDU Rohtak) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 5 Assistant Professor Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with As prescribed by the UGC/State Government/Maharshi Dayanand University, Rohtak qualification can directly attend the interview on 27-07-2026.

content_sections.heading: MDU Rohtak Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MDU Rohtak Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MDU Rohtak Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MDU Rohtak Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: MDU Rohtak Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MDU Rohtak Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 30th July 2024. However, the last date for submission of application mentioned is 27th July 2026. Candidates should clarify this discrepancy by referring to the official notification.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant Professor at MDU Rohtak?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor post at Maharshi Dayanand University, Rohtak.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 57,700 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The qualifications required are as prescribed by the UGC, State Government, or Maharshi Dayanand University, Rohtak.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny of applications, followed by a walk-in interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for MDU Rohtak Assistant Professor recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Maharshi Dayanand University, Rohtak, Haryana.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Haryana apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria from all regions are encouraged to apply.
